profile.invite_code_help: Share your code or referral link. Anyone who visits your link will have the code pre-filled automatically when they sign up.
profile.no_referrals: No referrals yet. Share your invite code to get started!
profile.not_eligible: You're not eligible for a personal invite code yet. Keep participating and check back later.

settings.title: General
settings.require_help: When enabled, users must enter a valid invite code to complete registration.

eligibility.title: Personal invite code eligibility
eligibility.help: Control who gets their own personal invite code. Admins and whitelisted users always qualify. Leave a rule empty or at 0 to skip it; when several rules are set, a user must satisfy all of them.
eligibility.groups_help: If any groups are selected, only members of those groups get a personal invite code. Leave all unchecked to allow every group.
eligibility.whitelist_help: Usernames that always get an invite code, regardless of the rules above. Separate with commas, spaces, or new lines.

campaign.title: Campaign codes
campaign.help: Standalone invite codes that aren't tied to any user — ideal for social media or marketing promotions. They don't credit a referrer, but their uses are counted.
campaign.confirm_delete: Delete this campaign code? Anyone using it will no longer be able to register with it.

validation.required: An invite code is required to register.
